Interface FluentFindOperation.FindWithQuery<T>

Type Parameters:
T - returned type
All Superinterfaces:
FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFindWithoutQuery<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
FluentFindOperation.ExecutableFind<T>, FluentFindOperation.FindWithProjection<T>
Enclosing interface:
FluentFindOperation
public static interface FluentFindOperation.FindWithQuery<T> extends FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFindWithoutQuery<T>
Terminating operations invoking the actual query execution.
Since:
6.1
Author:
Michael Simons

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T>
    matching(String query)
    Set the filter query to be used.

    Set the filter query to be used.

    Set the filter statement to be used.
    FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T>

    Set the filter statement to be used.
    FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T>
    matching(QueryFragmentsAndParameters queryFragmentsAndParameters)
    Creates an executable query based on fragments and parameters.

    Methods inherited from interface FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFindWithoutQuery

    all

  • Method Details

    • matching

      FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T> matching(String query, Map<String,Object> parameter)
      Set the filter query to be used.
      Parameters:
      query - must not be null.
      parameter - an optional parameter map
      Returns:
      new instance of FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if query is null.

    • matching

      FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T> matching(QueryFragmentsAndParameters queryFragmentsAndParameters)
      Creates an executable query based on fragments and parameters. Hardly useful outside framework-code and we actively discourage using this method.
      Parameters:
      queryFragmentsAndParameters - encapsulated query fragments and parameters as created by the repository abstraction
      Returns:
      new instance of FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if queryFragmentsAndParameters is null.

    • matching

      default FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T> matching(String query)
      Set the filter query to be used.
      Parameters:
      query - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if query is null.

    • matching

      FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T> matching(org.neo4j.cypherdsl.core.Statement statement, Map<String,Object> parameter)
      Set the filter statement to be used.
      Parameters:
      statement - must not be null.
      parameter - will be merged with parameters in the statement. Parameters in parameter have precedence
      Returns:
      new instance of FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if statement is null.

    • matching

      default FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind<T> matching(org.neo4j.cypherdsl.core.Statement statement)
      Set the filter statement to be used.
      Parameters:
      statement - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of FluentFindOperation.TerminatingFind.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if criteria is null.
